testcase.name: test_owner_can_login

failure.message: AssertionError: operator_role should be 'owner', got None assert None == 'owner' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa71a01e9140>('operator_role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa71a01e9140> = {'email': 'TEST_owner_8131459c@testco.com', 'full_name': 'Test Owner 8131459c', 'id': '413817cb-724a-42f4-b0cf-a14c4a0bf6bf', 'operator_context': {'operator_id': '6ae0a1ec-1f46-4f91-9bac-3d6e45c2ea00', 'operator_name': 'TEST Company 8131459c', 'operator_role': 'owner', 'operator_type': 'travel', ...}, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_operator_owner_iteration50.py:105: in test_owner_can_login assert user.get("operator_role") == "owner", f"operator_role should be 'owner', got {user.get('operator_role')}" E AssertionError: operator_role should be 'owner', got None E assert None == 'owner' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa71a01e9140>('operator_role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa71a01e9140> = {'email': 'TEST_owner_8131459c@testco.com', 'full_name': 'Test Owner 8131459c', 'id': '413817cb-724a-42f4-b0cf-a14c4a0bf6bf', 'operator_context': {'operator_id': '6ae0a1ec-1f46-4f91-9bac-3d6e45c2ea00', 'operator_name': 'TEST Company 8131459c', 'operator_role': 'owner', 'operator_type': 'travel', ...}, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_create_operator_without_owner_account
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_operator_owner_iteration50.py:132: in test_create_operator_without_owner_account assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create operator failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create operator failed: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","operator_type"],"msg":"Input should be 'travel', 'hotel', 'restaurant', 'car_rental', 'event', 'laundry', 'banquet', 'cinema', 'pharmacy' or 'multi'","input":"hotels","ctx":{"expected":"'travel', 'hotel', 'restaurant', 'car_rental', 'event', 'laundry', 'banquet', 'cinema', 'pharmacy' or 'multi'"}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
